items.title: Biodefense in the Intelligence Age
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026-06-04 发布《Biodefense in the Intelligence Age》，提出 AI-powered biological resilience 行动计划：以 trusted access 给政府、公卫、国家实验室、大学、非营利和责任企业提供 GPT-Rosalind/Rosalind Biodefense 等能力，通过五个支柱推进防御者访问、医学反制措施、早期预警、诊断准备响应，以及 impact/risk/resilience 双账本评估。证据背景来自同周 GPT-Rosalind 更新：MedChemBench 27.5% vs GPT-5.5 25.1%、GeneBench 21.6% vs 20.4% 且少用 31% tokens、LabWorkBench 63.2% vs 55.8%。局限是计划仍以高层框架为主，缺少项目级验收指标、失败案例、partner selection 标准、外部复核细节和跨国公平治理说明。

evidence.label: Mandatory nucleic acid synthesis screening open letter

sources.name: OpenAI Global Affairs
sources.description: OpenAI official Global Affairs article and action-plan PDF selected by the hourly Chinese Daily Report automation.

dedupe.notes: Exact rg check against public data found no existing biodefense-in-the-intelligence-age URL, external_id, or title before publish; publish-public-run performs final cross-history duplicate validation.

sub_agent_reviews.summary: Single Scout returned nine dated candidates across llm-agent, llm-post-training, and ai-safety. Main agent selected OpenAI Biodefense in the Intelligence Age for strongest date evidence, source authority, and AI-for-safety depth.
